name: ROS 2 Humble - Kinematic Guard Dev
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'sudo rosdep init 2>/dev/null || true; rosdep update; rosdep install --from-paths src --ignore-src -r -y; source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash; colcon build --symlink-install; echo "source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash" >> ~/.bashrc; echo "source $(pwd)/install/setup.bash" >> ~/.bashrc'
